form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Tick's A Yankin at this track over 1609m in a NW3500L4 on March 29 at $1.60. Performed better the start before where he won by 9 m as favourite (Fr6) at this track (1:55.20) beating Moved Bythe Spirit in NW3500L4 on March 22 at $1.90. Very hard to beat from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 1609m at this track, beaten 21 m by Commander Bob (1:54.30) in NW2500L4 on March 29 at $10.60. Sure to be about the mark again.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Fox Valley Monaco at this track over 1609m in a NW5000L4 on April 6 at $33.80. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 3rd (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 14 m by Fox Valley Monaco (1:53.10) in NW5000L4 on March 29 at $48.80. Genuine contender in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track, beaten 7 m by Dancethewayuare (1:55.00) in NW3500L4 on April 7 at $14.10. The run previous 7th (Fr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 6 m by Master Yossi (1:54.40) in NW6500L4 on March 29 at $56.80. No surprise to see him bounce back to form.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Fr3) over 1609m at Hoosier Park, beaten 40 m by Larjon Levi (1:51.00) in CLHDC20/25 on April 3 at $61.60.
